description_long: This is a double bed with a simple metal frame painted in blue, featuring both a headboard and a footboard composed of vertical bars. The bed is topped with a white comforter that has a subtle floral pattern, and two large pillows with matching white and gray patterned pillowcases are neatly placed at the head. The lower edge of the comforter is adorned with a decorative red and white woven band, adding a touch of traditional or folk design. The mattress appears thick and is fully covered by the bedding, with no visible gaps between the frame and the mattress. The overall construction suggests a sturdy yet lightweight design, suitable for both indoor and temporary outdoor urban settings.
description: A double bed with a blue metal slatted frame, white patterned bedding, and a decorative red woven band at the foot. Two large pillows rest at the head, and the bed exudes a simple, traditional style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue metal headboard, two large patterned pillows, and the decorative red band on the comforter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bed, the blue metal bars of the frame, and the arrangement of the pillows.
description_view_2: Rear view with a clear look at the footboard, the red decorative band, and the full width of the bed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the blue metal bars and the alignment of the bedding and pillows.
